About

ABOUT MechaDynamics Solutions

MechaDynamics Solutions is an engineering and product development company focused on building intelligent systems for real-world applications.

We specialize in integrating mechanical design, physical AI (reinforcement learning, imitation learning, SLAM Nav) electronics, and advanced software to create complete, high-performance solutions — from early-stage concepts to fully functional prototypes and production-ready systems.

With hands-on experience in robotics, automation, and AI-driven systems, our approach is practical, efficient, and focused on results that work reliably outside the lab.

Senior Mechanical Design Engineer
WeGo-Robotics · South Korea

Devomech Solutions · Pakistan

What We Do

Core Services

End-to-end engineering — mechanical hardware, electronics, and AI-driven software, all under one roof.

⚙️
Product Development

We turn ideas into real, manufacturable products from concept to delivery.

  • Concept development & system architecture
  • Engineering design (mechanical + electrical)
  • Rapid prototyping & testing
  • Design for manufacturing (DFM)
  • MVP development for startups
📐
Mechanical Engineering

Precision engineering for reliable, real-world performance.

  • 3D CAD design & assemblies
  • Structural and load analysis
  • Mechanism design
  • Tolerance optimization
  • Manufacturing-ready designs
🔌
Mechatronics & Embedded

Bridging hardware and intelligent control systems.

  • Sensor and actuator integration
  • Embedded system development (MCU)
  • Control systems engineering
  • System integration and debugging
🤖
Robotics Engineering

Advanced robotic systems for mobility and autonomy.

  • Industrial robotics systems
  • Autonomous Mobile Robots (AMR)
  • Quadruped and humanoid platforms
  • Custom robotic solutions
🧠
AI & Software Solutions

Intelligence that powers next-generation engineering systems.

  • Computer vision & perception
  • SLAM and autonomous navigation
  • Reinforcement learning for robotics
  • Control software and GUIs
  • Data-driven intelligent systems
🚀
Ready to Build?

Have an engineering challenge? Let's turn your idea into a real, working system.


Contact Us →
Selected Work

Projects

Real systems engineered for real-world deployment — from autonomous robots to industrial machinery.

01
Autonomous Inspection

Autonomous Inspection System

08 Projects Delivered

Robotic inspection platform with advanced perception and navigation capabilities for complex, uneven environments. Delivers reliable inspection in dynamic real-world conditions where traditional methods fail.

Mechanical DesignComputer VisionPerception & NavigationQuadruped RobotUnitree Go2SLAM
02
Industrial Robotics · Imitation Learning

Industrial Robot for Imitation Learning

03 Projects Delivered

Complete dual-arm robotic platform for imitation learning and tele-operation research. Full end-to-end ownership: mechanical design, servo motor control, linear actuator integration, mechatronics, Python GUI, and system integration — the hardware foundation that enables AI software to function.

Mechanical DesignServo Motor ControlLinear ActuatorImitation LearningMechatronicsAgilex Ranger
▶ Watch Project Video
03
Industrial Automation

Vertical Conveyor System

1m-tall vertical conveyor system for educational and industrial work-automation applications. High mechanical complexity requiring careful integration of structure, motion control, and operational functionality.

Mechanical DesignSolidWorksIndustrial AutomationMotion Control
04
Humanoid Robotics · Product Design

Modular Head Design — Unitree Humanoid Robot

Custom modular sensor head for the Unitree humanoid robot platform. Houses multiple perception sensors in a sleek, functional enclosure with optimal positioning for computer vision tasks. Designed for manufacturability and field serviceability.

Product DesignSensor IntegrationHumanoid Robot3D PrintingUnitree
05
AMR Integration · Custom Housing

Robot Arm Housing with AMR Integration

04 Custom Projects Delivered

Fully customised housing and sensor kit designs integrating collaborative robot arms onto Autonomous Mobile Robot platforms. Four customised systems delivered for MiR platform, WeGo platform, and custom base units — each tailored to specific arm types and payload requirements.

Mechanical DesignSheet MetalAMR IntegrationMiR PlatformWeGo PlatformSystem Integration

Why Choose Us

Why MechaDynamics Solutions

Deep engineering expertise with fast, practical delivery — real solutions that work outside the lab.

01
End-to-End Capability

Hardware and software under one roof — mechanical design, electronics, embedded systems, and AI, all integrated seamlessly.

02
Real-World Foundation

Built through projects for Samsung, DOOSAN, Aramco, and other global organizations — industry-level standards on every engagement.

03
Fast Iteration Cycles

Rapid prototyping and tight feedback loops. We move from concept to working prototype faster without sacrificing quality.

04
Startup to Industrial

Experience with early-stage startups needing MVPs and large industrial clients requiring production-grade systems.

05
Deployable Solutions

Every system we build is designed to perform reliably in the real world — not just in the lab.

06
Global Reach

Based in South Korea, working globally — with delivery experience across Asia and the Middle East.

Our Approach

How We Work

01
Requirements

We analyze your idea, constraints, and goals before touching any tools.

02
Concept & Design

Full engineering design and system architecture — hardware and software planned together.

03
Prototype

Rapid physical prototyping and rigorous testing to validate design early.

04
Integration

System-level refinement, full mechanical and software integration.

05
Delivery

Final delivery with documentation and ongoing support.

✓ Downloaded!

How to Add a New Image

  1. Go to base64.guru/converter/encode/image → upload your photo → copy the base64 text
  2. Open this HTML file in VS Code (free at code.visualstudio.com)
  3. Press Ctrl+F, search for var IMG_other5 — you'll see all image variables here
  4. Add a new line: var IMG_NEWPHOTO = "data:image/jpeg;base64,PASTE_HERE";
  5. Search for s("I_other5" and add below it: s("I_newphoto", IMG_NEWPHOTO);
  6. Find where you want it in the HTML and add: <img id="I_newphoto" style="width:100%;height:240px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:8px">
  7. Save file → upload to GitHub → done!
